field.label: File name
field.required: Enter the file title

field.label: File Type
field.hint: Select the file type for visualization/processing purposes

field.label: TOC
field.hint: Field for the Table of Contents

field.label: Exclude curation tasks
field.hint: Select the curation tasks to exclude for this bitstream

field.label: Authors
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the resource

field.label: Role
field.hint: Enter the Author's role

field.label: Secondary Author
field.hint: Enter the names of the secondary author(s)

field.label: Role
field.hint: Enter the Author's role

field.label: Identifiers
field.hint: Select the identifier

field.label: Sequence number
field.hint: Enter the sequence number of the resource

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Alternative title
field.hint: Enter the alternative title of the resource

field.label: Issue date
field.hint: Enter the publication date of the resource

field.label: Authors
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the resource

field.label: Secondary Author
field.hint: Enter the names of the secondary author(s)

field.label: Resource type
field.hint: Enter the resource type

field.label: Format
field.hint: Enter the resource format

field.label: Publisher
field.hint: Enter the name of the publisher/printer of the resource

field.label: Description
field.hint: Describe the resource

field.label: Physical description
field.hint: Describe the physical features of the resource

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the municipality of the work’s provenance

field.label: Part of
field.hint: If the item is "part of" (i.e., is "contained in") another item, specify the name of the other item

field.label: Contains
field.hint: If the item is "contains" another item (i.e., if another item is "part of" this one), specify the name of the other item

field.label: Related to
field.hint: Enter the related documents

field.label: Referenced resources
field.hint: A related resource that is referenced, cited, or otherwise pointed to by the described resource

field.label: Rights holder
field.hint: Enter the name of the resource's rights holder

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority will trigger the pre-fill functionality (item template), if a template is set on the corrensponding Aggregation

field.label: Path
field.hint: If the item is related to a Path, enter the Path name

field.label: Place
field.hint: If the resource is related to a Place, enter the Place name

field.label: Other resources referencing
field.hint: A related resource that references, cites, or otherwise points to the described resource

field.label: Language
field.hint: If the language of the resource does not appear in the list, select 'Other'. If the content does not have a language (e.g., datasets or images), select 'None'

field.label: Subject / Keyword
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Series/N.
field.hint: Enter name and serial number of the resource

field.label: Projects
field.hint: Enter the name of the project related to the resource

field.label: Related event
field.hint: Enter the title of the event/conference at which the resource was possibly presented

field.label: Person
field.hint: Enter the name of the person related to the resource

field.label: Fonds
field.hint: Enter the name of the fonds related to the resource

field.label: OPAC link
field.hint: Enter the URL to activate the link to the online catalogue

field.label: Other bibliographical links
field.hint: Enter the URL linking to other bibliographic links

field.label: Notes
field.hint: Enter other comments/notes to the resource

field.label: Resource type
field.hint: Enter the resource type

field.label: Authors
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the resource

field.label: Organization
field.hint: Enter the name of the Organization responsible for the resource

field.label: Family
field.hint: Enter the name of the Family responsible for the resource

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Alternative title
field.hint: Enter the alternative title of the resource

field.label: Issue date
field.hint: Enter the publication date of the resource

field.label: Start/Early date
field.hint: Enter the earliest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: End/Late date
field.hint: Enter the latest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: Production date or range
field.hint: Enter the production date or range

field.label: Notes on date
field.hint: Enter any notes on dating

field.label: Identifiers
field.hint: Select the identifier

field.label: Sequence number
field.hint: Enter the sequential number of the resource

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Physical type
field.hint: Enter the physical type of the resource

field.label: Physical support
field.hint: Description of the physical characteristics of the medium

field.label: Access conditions
field.hint: Enter information regarding the access conditions

field.label: Licence
field.hint: Enter the terms of use attributed to this record

field.label: Bibliographic citations
field.hint: Enter the bibliographic citations referencing the resource

field.label: Person
field.hint: Enter the name of the person to whom the resource is linked, if any

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Linked document
field.hint: Enter any linked documents

field.label: Bibliography
field.hint: Enter the bibliography related to the resource

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the title of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the title of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Year of publication
field.required: Enter the year of publication of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the year of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Publisher
field.required: Enter the publisher of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the publisher of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Place of publication
field.required: Enter the place of publication of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the place of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Author(s)
field.required: Enter the author(s) of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Bibliography type
field.required: Indicate the bibliography type
field.hint: Enter the type of bibliography

field.label: Language
field.hint: If the language of the resource does not appear in the list, select 'Other'. If the content does not have a language (e.g., datasets or images), select 'None'

field.label: Subject / Keyword
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Projects
field.hint: Enter the title of the project to which the resource is possibly related

field.label: Related event
field.hint: Enter the title of the event/convention to which the resource is linked

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the municipality of the work’s provenance

field.label: Fonds
field.hint: Enter the name of the fonds to which the resource belongs

field.label: Description
field.hint: Describe the resource

field.label: Annotation by the archivist
field.hint: Enter any additional service annotations by the archivist

field.label: Preservation status
field.hint: Enter the conservation status of the resource

field.label: Notes on preservation
field.hint: Enter any annotations regarding the resource's conservation status

field.label: Notes
field.hint: Enter other comments/notes to the resource

field.label: URL
field.hint: Enter the URL

field.label: Place
field.hint: If the resource is related to a Place, enter the Place name

field.label: Name
field.required: Enter the name of the Person
field.hint: Enter Person's name

field.label: Translated name
field.hint: Enter the translated name

field.label: Name variants
field.hint: Enter any variants of the name

field.label: Gender
field.hint: Enter the gender of the person

field.label: Role
field.hint: Enter the person's role

field.label: Country
field.hint: Enter the country

field.label: Nationality
field.hint: Enter the Person nationality

field.label: Date of birth
field.hint: Enter the person's date of birth

field.label: Year of birth
field.hint: Enter the year of birth of the person

field.label: Date of death
field.hint: Enter the date of death

field.label: Year of death
field.hint: Enter the year of death

field.label: Place of birth
field.hint: Enter the place of birth of the person

field.label: Place of death
field.hint: Enter the place of death

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Interest
field.hint: Enter the person's interests or activities using the Library of Congress Subject Headings (https://www.loc.gov/aba/publications/FreeLCSH/freelcsh.html)

field.label: Participated in
field.hint: Enter any events the person took part in

field.label: Activity period
field.hint: Enter the period of activity of the person

field.label: Biography
field.hint: Enter the biography of the person

field.label: VIAF ID
field.hint: Enter the person's VIAF ID

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: OPAC Link
field.hint: Enter the URL to activate the link to the online catalogue

field.label: Other bibliographic source
field.hint: Enter the URL of any other bibliographic sources

field.label: Dizionario Biografico degli Italiani (DBI) link
field.hint: Enter the l'URL for Dizionario Biografico degli Italiani

field.label: Enciclopedia Italiana link
field.hint: Enter the URL for Enciclopedia Italiana

field.label: Wikipedia link
field.hint: Enter Wikipedia link

field.label: DBpedia link
field.hint: Enter link to DBPedia

field.label: VIAF link
field.hint: Enter link to VIAF

field.label: Encyclopaedia Britannica link
field.hint: Enter link to Encyclopedia Britannica

field.label: Getty ULAN link
field.hint: Enter link to Getty ULAN

field.label: Other links
field.hint: Enter link to external resources related to the header

field.label: Organization name
field.required: Enter the name of the Organization
field.hint: Enter the name of the Organization

field.label: Parent Organization
field.hint: Enter the name of the Parent Organization

field.label: Director
field.hint: Enter the name of the director of the Organization

field.label: Date of foundation
field.hint: Enter the foundation date of the Organization

field.label: Organization history
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the Organization history

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the city where the Organization is located

field.label: Country
field.hint: Enter the country where the Organization is located

field.label: Address
field.hint: Enter the address of the Organization

field.label: Postal code
field.hint: Enter the post code of the Organization

field.label: Type
field.required: Enter the type of Organization
field.hint: Enter the type of Organization

field.label: Accessibility
field.hint: Enter the level of accessibility of the Organization

field.label: Services
field.hint: Enter the services provided by the Organization

field.label: Collection management policies
field.hint: Enter the policies for collection management

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Project name
field.required: Enter the name of the Project
field.hint: Enter the name of the Project

field.label: Acronym
field.hint: Enter the acronym of the project

field.label: Project coordinator
field.hint: Enter the name of the internal project coordinator

field.label: Internal identifier
field.hint: Enter internal project identifier

field.label: Partner Organizations
field.hint: Enter the name of any partner organizations

field.label: Researcher/Coordinator
field.hint: Enter the name of the project coordinator

field.label: OpenAIRE ID
field.hint: Enter the OpenAIRE ID

field.label: Participating Organizations
field.hint: Enter the names of the participating organizations

field.label: Project URL
field.hint: Enter the URL of the project

field.label: OA Mandate
field.hint: Enter whether the OA mandate exists

field.label: OA Policy URL
field.hint: Enter the URL related to the UA policy

field.label: Start date
field.hint: Enter the start date of the project

field.label: Estimated end date
field.hint: Enter the estimated end date for the project

field.label: Status
field.hint: Enter the status of the project

field.label: Project type
field.hint: Enter the type of the project

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Co-Investigator(s)
field.hint: Enter the other researchers contributing to the project

field.label: Project keywords
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority will trigger the pre-fill functionality (item template), if a template is set on the corrensponding Aggregation

field.label: Event Name
field.required: Enter the name of the Event
field.hint: Enter the name of the Event

field.label: Acronym
field.hint: Enter the acronym of the event

field.label: Event Variants
field.hint: Enter any variants of the event name

field.label: Event Type
field.hint: Enter the type of the event

field.label: Start date
field.hint: Enter the start date of the event

field.label: End Date
field.hint: Enter the end date of the event

field.label: Place
field.hint: Enter the location of the event

field.label: Country
field.hint: Enter the country in which the event was held

field.label: Event description
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the event description

field.label: Keyword(s)
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Wikipedia link
field.hint: Enter link to Wikipedia

field.label: DBpedia link
field.hint: Enter the DBpedia link

field.label: Abbreviation
field.hint: Enter the bibliographic abbreviations of the resource

field.label: Title
field.hint: Enter the title of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Editor
field.hint: Enter the editor of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Publisher
field.hint: Enter the publisher of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Place
field.hint: Enter the place of edition of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Year of publication
field.hint: Enter the year of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Author(s)
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Archival source name
field.required: Enter the name of the archival source
field.hint: Enter the name of the Fonds or archival source

field.label: Alternative name
field.hint: Enter the alternative name of the Fonds

field.label: Description level type
field.hint: Enter the type of description level

field.label: Creator (Person)
field.hint: Enter the name of the person who created the archive (format: ‘Surname, Name’)

field.label: Creator (Organization)
field.hint: Enter the name of the Organization that produced the resource

field.label: Creator (Family)
field.hint: Enter the name of the Family that produced the resource

field.label: Custodian
field.hint: Enter the person or organization responsible for the care, control, and preservation of the archive

field.label: Higher hierarchical level
field.hint: Enter the upper hierarchical level

field.label: Archival extent (in linear meters)
field.hint: Enter the extension of the archive

field.label: Photographic fond type
field.hint: Enter the type of the photographic fonds

field.label: Fonds shelfmark
field.hint: Enter the shelfmark of the fonds

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Description
field.hint: Describe the fonds's contents

field.label: Archival extent
field.hint: Enter the archival extent

field.label: Archival history
field.hint: Describe the archival history of the fonds

field.label: Language
field.hint: Language of the resource. If the language does not appear in the list, select 'Other'. If the content does not actually have a language (e.g., if it is a dataset or image), select 'None'

field.label: Number of items in the fonds
field.hint: Enter the number of resources in the fonds

field.label: Archivist’s notes
field.hint: Enter the notes from the Archivist

field.label: Related documents
field.hint: Enter references to any related documentation

field.label: Access conditions
field.hint: Enter information regarding the access conditions

field.label: Annotations
field.hint: Enter any annotations

field.label: Preservation status
field.hint: Enter the archives' state preservation

field.label: Notes on reproduction conditions
field.hint: Enter any annotations regarding the reproduction condition of the archive

field.label: Bibliography
field.hint: Enter the bibliography related to the resource

field.label: Subseries
field.required: Specify if this is the lower level of the archival hierarchy or not
field.hint: Is this the lower level of the archival hierarchy?

field.label: Projects
field.hint: Enter any projects to which the archival source is linked

field.label: URL
field.required: Indicate if this is the lowest archival level
field.hint: Enter the URL related to the archival source

field.label: Compiler
field.hint: Enter the name of the person who compiled the fonds record

field.label: Recent end date format
field.hint: Enter the format of the recent end date

field.label: Start date of recent endpoint
field.hint: Enter the starting date of the recent end

field.label: Specification to end date
field.hint: Report any specifics to the end date

field.label: End date of recent extreme
field.hint: Enter the ending date of the recent extreme

field.label: Validity of the recent extreme
field.hint: Enter the validity of the recent extreme

field.label: End date of recent endpoint
field.hint: Enter the end date of the latest extent

field.label: Validity of the recent endpoint
field.hint: Enter the validity of the recent extreme

field.label: Date format of the remote endpoint
field.hint: Enter the date format of the remote endpoint

field.label: Starting date of the remote end
field.hint: Enter the starting date of the remote endpoint

field.label: Start date specifications
field.hint: Report any specifications to the start date

field.label: End date of the remote endpoint
field.hint: Enter the end date of the remote endpoint

field.label: Validity of the remote endpoint
field.hint: Enter the validity of the remote endpoint

field.label: Sequence number
field.hint: Enter the sequential number of the resource

field.label: Show on Home Page
field.hint: Select whether to show this item on the homepage

field.label: Order
field.hint: Enter the order

field.label: Compiler name
field.hint: Enter the name of the compiler of the record

field.label: Compiler qualification
field.hint: Enter the title of the compiler of the record

field.label: Change type
field.hint: Specify the type of change entered

field.label: Date of change
field.hint: Specify the date of the change

field.label: Place name
field.required: Enter the name of the Place
field.hint: Enter the name of the Place

field.label: Alternative place name
field.hint: Enter the alternative name of the Place

field.label: Latitude
field.hint: Enter the latitude of the place

field.label: Longitude
field.hint: Enter the longitude of the place

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Related places
field.hint: Enter any other related places

field.label: DBpedia link
field.hint: Enter link to DBPedia

field.label: Geonames link
field.hint: Enter link to Geonames

field.label: TGN link
field.hint: Enter link to TGN

field.label: Links to Wikipedia
field.hint: Enter link to Wikipedia

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Family name
field.required: Enter the name of the Family

field.hint: Enter the alternative name of the Family

field.hint: Enter family description

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Nationality
field.hint: Enter the family's nationality

field.label: Participated in
field.hint: Enter any events in which the family was involved

field.label: Compiler
field.hint: Enter the name of the person who filled out the fonds

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Compiler name
field.hint: Enter the name of the compiler of the record

field.label: Compiler qualification
field.hint: Enter the title of the compiler of the record

field.label: Change type
field.hint: Specify the type of change entered

field.label: Date of change
field.hint: Specify the date of the change

field.label: Aggregation name
field.required: Enter the title of the Aggregation
field.hint: Enter the name of the Aggregation or Digital Collection

field.label: Description
field.hint: Describe the contents of the aggregation

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Higher hierarchical level
field.hint: Enter the upper hierarchical level

field.label: Subseries
field.required: Specify if this is the lower level of the archival hierarchy or not
field.hint: Is this the lower level of the archival hierarchy?

field.label: Show on Home Page
field.hint: Should this item be shown on the home page?

field.label: Order
field.hint: Enter order

field.label: News title
field.required: Enter the title of the News
field.hint: Enter the title of the News

field.label: Display
field.hint: Choose whether to display this item on the homepage

field.label: URL
field.hint: Enter the URL

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Order
field.hint: Items displayed on the homepage are sorted by ascending order (e.g., 1 first, 2 second)

field.label: Page title
field.required: Enter the title of the Page
field.hint: Enter the Page title

field.label: Description
field.hint: Enter the page content

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Keyword(s)
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Path name
field.required: Enter the title of the Path
field.hint: Enter the Path name

field.label: Description
field.hint: Enter the description of the path

field.label: Keyword(s)
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Order
field.hint: Items displayed on the homepage are sorted by ascending order (e.g., 1 first, 2 second)

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Contains
field.hint: Indicate the elements of the path

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Issue details
field.hint: Type of journal (supplement, special issue, annex)

field.label: Issue number, supplement, and/or other
field.hint: Numeration

field.label: Year
field.hint: Reference to the year of the issue

field.label: From year
field.hint: From

field.label: To year
field.hint: To

field.label: Volume
field.hint: Reference to the volume of the journal

field.label: Volume
field.hint: From

field.label: Volume
field.hint: To

field.label: Issue date
field.hint: Enter the publication date of the resource

field.label: Start/Early date
field.hint: Enter the earliest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: End/Late date
field.hint: Enter the latest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: Edition
field.hint: To be used for journals that have multiple editions

field.label: Description
field.hint: Describe the resource

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the municipality of the work’s provenance

field.label: Journal name
field.hint: Name of the referenced journal

field.label: Sequence number
field.hint: Enter the sequence number of the resource

field.label: Licence
field.hint: Enter the terms of use attributed to this record

field.label: Linked document
field.hint: Enter any related documents

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Place
field.hint: If the resource is related to a Place, enter the Place name

field.label: Language
field.hint: Language of the resource. If the language does not appear in the list, select Other". If the content does not really have a language (e.g., if it is a dataset or an image), select "None”

field.label: Journal title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Alternative title
field.hint: Enter the alternative title of the resource

field.label: Description level type
field.hint: Enter the type of description level

field.label: ISSN
field.hint: Enter the ISSN of the periodical

field.label: History
field.hint: Enter any information related to the history of the journal

field.label: Production date or range
field.hint: Enter the production date or range

field.label: Language
field.hint: Enter the language in which the journal is published

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Shelfmark
field.hint: Enter the shelfmark of the journal

field.label: Related titles
field.hint: Enter any related journal

field.label: Owned volumes
field.hint: Enter the owned issue years

field.label: Related persons
field.hint: Enter any persons related to the journal

field.label: Other identifiers
field.hint: Enter any identifiers of the journal

field.label: OPAC link
field.hint: Enter the URL to activate the link to the online catalogue

field.label: Other links
field.hint: Enter links to external resources related to the journal

field.label: Higher hierarchical level
field.hint: Enter the upper hierarchical level

field.label: Subseries
field.required: Specify if this is the lower level of the archival hierarchy or not
field.hint: Is this the lower level of the archival hierarchy?

field.label: Journal history
field.hint: Enter the different periods that have characterized the history of the journal

field.label: Sequence number
field.hint: Enter the sequence number of the resource

field.label: Show on Home Page
field.hint: Should this item be shown on the home page?

field.label: Order
field.hint: Enter the order

field.label: Start/Early date
field.hint: Enter the earliest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: End/Late date
field.hint: Enter the latest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: Publisher
field.hint: Enter the name of the publisher/printer of the resource

field.label: Format
field.hint: Enter the format of the journal

field.label: Inventory Number
field.hint: Enter the inventory number of the journal

field.label: Notes
field.hint: Enter any other comments/notes

field.label: Relation Type
field.hint: Enter the type of relationship

field.label: Related Journal
field.hint: Enter the name of the related journalfonds

field.label: Name
field.hint: Enter the name of the related person

field.label: Role
field.hint: Enter the person's role in relation to the journal

field.label: Role
field.hint: Enter the author's role related to this resource

field.label: Creator
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the resource

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Alternative title
field.hint: Enter the alternative title of the resource

field.label: Supplement to the photograph title
field.required: Enter the type of shot
field.hint: This is the field in which to describe the framing of the image

field.label: Authors
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the resource

field.label: Subject notes
field.hint: This field is intended for the physical description. Include here any details about the subjects portrayed in the photograph and/or the content information summarized in the titles (proper or attributed)

field.label: Location of the depicted subject
field.hint: This field records the physical description of the image, adding details about the objects depicted in the photograph to complement the content information summarized in the title (proper or attributed)

field.label: Subject / Keyword
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Production date or range
field.hint: Enter the production date or range

field.label: Portion of production date or range
field.hint: Fraction of production date or range

field.label: Fonds
field.hint: Enter the reference archive being cataloged

field.label: Description
field.hint: Describe the resource

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Function
field.hint: Enter the description of the function of the photograph

field.label: Mode of use
field.hint: Enter the mode of use of the photograph

field.label: Physical Collection
field.hint: Enter the collection to which the object belongs

field.label: Collection owner
field.hint: Enter the owner of the collection

field.label: Collection information
field.hint: Enter any additional information about the collection

field.label: Related to
field.hint: Enter related documents

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority will trigger the pre-fill functionality (item template), if a template is set on the corrensponding Aggregation

field.label: Part of
field.hint: Enter the "container" of the photograph

field.label: Contains
field.hint: Enter the "content" of the photograph

field.label: Identifiers
field.hint: Select the identifier

field.label: Record type
field.hint: Enter the type of ICCD card used to catalog the object

field.label: Photograph type
field.required: Enter the photo type
field.hint: This field defines the photographic object based on its role in the creative process. Photographic works, representing different stages of image development, can be classified by their function

field.label: Sequence number
field.hint: Enter the sequence number of the resource

field.label: Object parts
field.hint: Enter any parts from which the photographic object is composed

field.label: Number of photographic items
field.hint: Number of the photographic objects

field.label: Country
field.hint: Enter the Country of origin of the resource

field.label: State
field.hint: Enter the State of origin of the resource

field.label: Region
field.hint: Enter the Region of origin of the resource

field.label: Region abbreviation
field.hint: Enter the abbreviation of the region of provenance of the resource

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the municipality of the work’s provenance

field.label: Place of custody
field.hint: Enter the place of storage of the resource

field.label: Place
field.hint: If the resource is related to a Place, enter the Place name

field.label: Inventory date
field.hint: Enter the date the inventory date of the resource

field.label: Start/Early date
field.hint: Enter the earliest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: End/Late date
field.hint: Enter the latest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: Notes on date
field.hint: Enter any notes on dating

field.label: Color
field.required: Enter the color data
field.hint: This is the field in which to Enter whether the photograph is black/white, color, mixed (for hand-colored photographs)

field.label: Material and technique
field.hint: The field provides information on the process used in the execution of the photographic work

field.label: Technical Notes
field.hint: The field can be used to further describe, if known, methods and technical particularities of execution of the cataloged work

field.label: Format
field.hint: Enter the resource format

field.label: Unit of measurement
field.hint: Enter the unit used to measure the object

field.label: Height
field.hint: Enter in this field non-standard height information (not present in the drop-down menu)

field.label: Width
field.hint: Enter in this field non-standard width information (not present in the drop-down menu)

field.label: Person
field.hint: Enter the name of the person to whom the photograph is possibly connected

field.label: Related Event
field.hint: Enter the title of the event/convention at which the resource was possibly presented

field.label: Inscription present on photograph
field.hint: Enter information about any inscriptions on the photograph

field.label: Arms/mark/stamp present on the photograph
field.hint: Enter information related to any coats of arms/brands/stamps present on the photograph

field.label: Bibliography
field.hint: Enter the bibliography related to the resource

field.label: Preservation status
field.required: Enter the state of preservation
field.hint: Enter the conservation status of the photograph

field.label: Preservation status details
field.hint: Enter specifics regarding the conservation status of the photograph

field.label: Licence
field.hint: Enter the terms of use attributed to this record

field.label: Transcription of the inscription
field.hint: Enter the transcription of the inscription

field.label: Inscription location
field.hint: Enter the position in which the inscription was made

field.label: Script / Lettering of the inscription
field.hint: Enter the font in which the inscription was made

field.label: Technique of the inscription
field.hint: Enter the technique by which the inscription was made

field.label: Language of the inscription
field.hint: Enter the language of the inscription

field.label: Category
field.hint: Enter the class to which the inscription belongs

field.label: Description of arms/mark/stamp
field.hint: Enter the description of arms/mark/stamp

field.label: Place of arms/mark/stamp
field.hint: Enter the location of arms/mark/stamp

field.label: Identification of arms/mark/stamp
field.hint: Enter the identification of arms/mark/stamp

field.label: Qualification of arms/mark/stamp
field.hint: Enter the qualification of arms/mark/stamp

field.label: Quantity
field.hint: Enter how many times the arms/mark/timbre is repeated on the cataloged object

field.label: Category
field.hint: Enter the class to which the arms/mark/timbre belongs

field.label: Title
field.hint: Enter the title of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Year of publication
field.hint: Enter the year of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Publisher
field.hint: Enter the publisher of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Place of publication
field.hint: Enter the place of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Author(s)
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Bibliography type
field.hint: Enter the type of bibliography

field.label: Author
field.hint: Enter the author's name (format: ‘Surname, Name’)

field.label: Role
field.hint: Enter the author's affiliation as on the resource

field.label: Other Author
field.hint: Enter the name(s) of the author(s) in the format ‘Last Name, First Name’

field.label: Role
field.hint: Enter the affiliation of the editor as stated on the publication

field.label: Identifier
field.hint: Select the identifier

field.label: Fonds
field.hint: Enters the reference archive being cataloged

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Subject / Topic
field.hint: Specify the subject of the item

field.label: Related Event
field.hint: Title of the event, if any, to which the resource is connected

field.label: Areas and content
field.hint: Description of the event and content of the resource

field.label: Organization
field.hint: Enter the name of the Organization responsible for the resource

field.label: Authors
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the resource

field.label: Secondary Author
field.hint: Enter the names of the secondary author(s)

field.label: Cultural area
field.hint: Enter the cultural scope/area of the resource

field.label: Place of detection
field.hint: Event place

field.label: Country
field.hint: Enter the Country of origin of the resource

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the Region of origin of the resource

field.label: Region
field.hint: Enter the Region of origin of the resource

field.label: Issue date
field.hint: Enter the publication date of the resource

field.label: Start/Early date
field.hint: Enter the earliest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: End/Late date
field.hint: Enter the latest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: Language
field.hint: If the language of the resource does not appear in the list, select 'Other'. If the content does not have a language (e.g., datasets or images), select 'None'

field.label: Notes
field.hint: Enter other comments/notes to the resource

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Subject / Keyword
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Path
field.hint: DSpace GLAM path

field.label: Project
field.hint: Title of the project to which the resource is linked

field.label: URL
field.hint: Enter the URL

field.label: Related documents
field.hint: Links to other Audio/Video Items in the digital library

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Licence
field.hint: Enter the terms of use attributed to this record

field.label: Privacy notes
field.hint: Enter the presence of any privacy-related releases provided during the event

field.label: File type
field.required: Enter the file type
field.hint: Enter the resource type

field.label: Physical type
field.hint: Select the physical type of the resource

field.label: Event duration
field.hint: Duration of the event expressed in hours, minutes and seconds, HH:MM:SS

field.label: Audio/Video encoding
field.hint: Select the audio/video stream encoding

field.label: Number of channels
field.hint: Number of recording channels - sampling frequency expressed in kHz

field.label: Sample rate
field.hint: Sampling frequency expressed in kHz

field.label: Bits per sample
field.hint: Number of bits of the audio/video recording

field.label: Equipment
field.hint: Instrumentation used for the audio/video recording

field.label: Physical support
field.hint: Description of the physical characteristics of the medium

field.label: Preservation status
field.hint: State of preservation of the analog medium

field.label: Notes on preservation
field.hint: Notes, if any, regarding the conservation status of the resource

field.label: Digital reproduction methodology and equipment
field.hint: Specifics on the type of methodology and instrumentation adopted for digital reproduction

field.label: Role
field.hint: Enter the author's role related to this resource

field.label: Author
field.hint: Enter the author's name (format: ‘Surname, Name’)

field.label: Opera title
field.required: Enter the main title of the resource
field.hint: Report the assigned title (e.g., by the author, or by the literature)

field.label: Alternative title
field.hint: Enter the alternative title of the resource

field.label: Issue date or première
field.hint: Enter the publication date of the resource

field.label: Authors
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the resource

field.label: Keywords
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Other links
field.hint: Enter links to external resources related to the work

field.label: Related event
field.hint: Enter the title of the event/conference to which the resource is linked

field.label: Notes
field.hint: Enter any other comments/notes to the resource

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Internal number
field.required: Enter internal number
field.hint: Enter the internal number of the object

field.label: Internal number reference
field.required: Enter the internal number reference
field.hint: Enter the internal number reference

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Object type
field.hint: Enter the resource type

field.label: Production date or range
field.hint: Enter the production date or range

field.label: Chronological range (century)
field.hint: Enter the period, century, or age

field.label: Portion of production date or range
field.hint: Fraction of production date or range

field.label: Start/Early date
field.hint: Enter the earliest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: End/Late date
field.hint: Enter the latest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the municipality of the work’s provenance

field.label: Cultural area
field.hint: Enter the cultural field to which the object is referable

field.label: Mint
field.hint: Enter the mint of origin of the object

field.label: Issuing authority
field.hint: Enter the issuing authority of the object

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Material and technique
field.hint: Enter any information regarding the material and technique of the item

field.label: Diameter
field.hint: Enter diameter of the object

field.label: Weight
field.hint: Enter the weight of the item

field.label: Die axis
field.hint: Enter the strike pattern of the coin

field.label: Obverse description
field.hint: Enter the description of the obverse of the coin

field.label: Reverse description
field.hint: Enter description of the reverse of the coin

field.label: Obverse legend
field.hint: Enter obverse legend

field.label: Reverse legend
field.hint: Enter legend of coin reverse

field.label: Description of the coin subject
field.hint: Specify the subject of the item

field.label: Bibliography
field.hint: Enter the bibliography related to the resource

field.label: Licence
field.hint: Enter the terms of use attributed to this record

field.label: SIRBeC record link
field.hint: Enter the SIRBeC record link

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the title of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the title of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Year of publication
field.required: Enter the year of publication of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the year of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Publisher
field.required: Enter the publisher of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the publisher of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Place of publication
field.required: Enter the place of publication of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the place of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Author(s)
field.required: Enter the author(s) of the bibliographic resource
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Bibliography type
field.required: Indicate the bibliography type
field.hint: Enter the type of bibliography

field.label: Number
field.hint: Enter the record number

field.label: Description level
field.hint: Enter the name of the level to which the resource belongs; please enter the link only to a level already present in the Digital Library otherwise the system will not save the value

field.label: Sequence number
field.hint: Enter the inventory number of the work

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Subject indication
field.hint: Specify the subject of the item

field.label: Resource type
field.hint: Enter the resource type

field.label: Technical data
field.hint: Enter any information about the material, technique and dimensions in cm of the object

field.label: Authors
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the resource

field.label: Reason for attribution
field.hint: Specify the reason for attributing the work (e.g. bibliography, oral source, etc.)

field.label: Issue date
field.hint: Enter the publication date of the resource

field.label: Start/Early date
field.hint: Enter the earliest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: End/Late date
field.hint: Enter the latest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: Production date or range
field.hint: Enter the production date or range

field.label: Notes on date
field.hint: Enter any notes on dating

field.label: Place of custody
field.hint: Enter the place of storage of the resource

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the municipality of the work’s provenance

field.label: Region abbreviation
field.hint: Enter the abbreviation of the region of provenance of the resource

field.label: Provenance
field.hint: Enter the provenance of the resource (e.g., private collection, donation, museum of)

field.label: Place
field.hint: If the resource is related to a Place, enter the Place name

field.label: Part of
field.hint: Enter the ‘container’ of the photograph, if any

field.label: Description
field.hint: Describe the resource

field.label: Notes
field.hint: Enter other comments/notes to the resource

field.label: Preservation status
field.hint: Enter the conservation status of the work

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Photo
field.hint: Enter the photograph of the work

field.label: Licence
field.hint: Enter the terms of use attributed to this record

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Other Bibliographical Links
field.hint: Enter URLs linking to other bibliographic links

field.label: Bibliography
field.hint: Enter the bibliography related to the resource

field.label: Title
field.hint: Enter the title of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Author(s)
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Editor(s)
field.hint: Enter editor(s) of the bibliographic resource

field.hint: Enter the publisher of the bibliographic resource

field.hint: Enter the place of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.hint: Enter the year of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.hint: Enter the type of bibliography

field.label: Author
field.hint: Enter the author's name (format: ‘Surname, Name’)

field.label: Role
field.hint: Enter the author's role related to this resource

field.label: Authors
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the resource

field.label: Secondary Author
field.hint: Enter the names of the secondary author(s)

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Alternative title
field.hint: Enter the alternative title of the resource

field.label: Issue date
field.hint: Enter the publication date of the resource

field.label: Publisher
field.hint: Enter the name of the publisher/printer of the resource

field.label: Physical description
field.hint: Describe the physical characteristics of the resource

field.label: Identifier
field.hint: Select the identifier type and enter the identifier ID

field.label: Resource type
field.hint: Enter the resource type

field.label: Language
field.hint: If the language of the resource does not appear in the list, select 'Other'. If the content does not have a language (e.g., datasets or images), select 'None'

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the municipality of the work’s provenance

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Subject / Keyword
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Project
field.hint: Enter the title of the project to which the resource is possibly related

field.label: Person
field.hint: Enter the name of the person the resource is possibly related to

field.label: Related event
field.hint: Enter the name of the event that constituted the first performance of the work whose libretto is proposed

field.label: Original work
field.hint: Enter the name of the original work from which the libretto is taken

field.label: Description level
field.hint: Enter the level of description of the resource; please only link to a level already present in the Digital Library otherwise the system will not save the value

field.label: Place
field.hint: If the resource is related to a Place, enter the Place name

field.label: OPAC link
field.hint: Enter the URL to activate the link to the online catalogue

field.label: Other bibliographical links
field.hint: Enter URL for linking to other bibliographic links

field.label: Notes
field.hint: Enter other comments/notes to the resource

field.label: Licence
field.hint: Enter the terms of use attributed to this record

field.label: Title
field.hint: Enter the bibliography related to the resource

field.label: Year of publication
field.hint: Enter the year of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Publisher
field.hint: Enter the publisher of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Place of publication
field.hint: Enter the place of publication of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Author(s)
field.hint: Enter the author(s) of the bibliographic resource

field.label: Bibliography type
field.hint: Enter the type of bibliography

field.label: Transcription of the inscription
field.hint: Enter the transcription of the entry

field.label: Position of the inscription
field.hint: Enter the location where the entry was made

field.label: Script / Lettering of the inscription
field.hint: Enter the font in which the inscription was realised

field.label: Technique of the inscription
field.hint: Enter the technique used to realise the inscription

field.label: Language of the inscription
field.hint: Enter the language of the inscription

field.label: Category
field.hint: Enter the class of the inscription

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the name of the resource
field.hint: Enter the main title of the resource

field.label: Alternative title
field.hint: Enter the alternative title of the resource

field.label: Creator
field.hint: Enter the name of the creator of the resource (format: ‘Surname, Name’)

field.label: Disciplinary scope
field.hint: Enter the disciplinary scope to which the object relates

field.label: Secondary disciplinary scope
field.hint: Enter the secondary disciplinary scope to which the object relates

field.label: Subject / Keyword
field.hint: Enter subjects and/or keywords

field.label: Production date or range
field.hint: Enter the production date or range

field.label: Portion of production date or range
field.hint: Fraction of production date or range

field.label: Level of description
field.hint: Enter the level of description of the object; please only link to a level already present in the Digital Library otherwise the system will not save the value

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract summarizing the resource content

field.label: Description
field.hint: Describe the resource

field.label: Function
field.hint: Enter the description of the object's function

field.label: Usage
field.hint: Enter the mode of use of the object

field.label: Physical Collection
field.hint: Enter the collection to which the object belongs

field.label: Collection owner
field.hint: Enter the owner of the collection

field.label: Collection information
field.hint: Enter any additional information about the collection

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority

field.label: Part of
field.hint: If the item is "part of" (i.e., is "contained in") another item, specify the name of the other item

field.label: Contains
field.hint: Enter the ‘contents’ of the item, if any

field.label: Identifier
field.hint: Select the identifier type and enter the identifier ID

field.label: Record type
field.hint: Enter the resource format

field.label: Resource type
field.hint: Enter the resource type

field.label: Object parts
field.hint: Enter any parts of which the object is composed

field.label: Number of objects
field.hint: Number of objects

field.label: Country
field.hint: Enter the Country of origin of the resource

field.label: State
field.hint: Enter the State of origin of the resource

field.label: Region
field.hint: Enter the Region of origin of the resource

field.label: Region abbreviation
field.hint: Enter the abbreviation of the region of provenance of the resource

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the municipality of the work’s provenance

field.label: Place of custody
field.hint: Enter the place of storage of the resource

field.label: Place
field.hint: If the resource is related to a Place, enter the Place name

field.label: Inventory date
field.hint: Enter the date the inventory date of the resource

field.label: Start/Early date
field.hint: Enter the earliest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: End/Late date
field.hint: Enter the latest date or chronological interval associated to the resource

field.label: Notes on date
field.hint: Enter any notes on dating

field.label: Material and technique
field.hint: Enter any information about the material and technique of the object

field.label: Unit of measurement
field.hint: Enter the unit used to measure the object

field.label: Height
field.hint: Enter the height of the object

field.label: Width
field.hint: Enter the width of the object

field.label: Length
field.hint: Enter the object length

field.label: Depth
field.hint: Enter object depth

field.label: Diameter
field.hint: Enter diameter of the object

field.label: Thickness
field.hint: Enter object thickness

field.label: Weight
field.hint: Enter the weight of the item

field.label: Capacity
field.hint: Enter object capacity

field.label: Power
field.hint: Enter object power

field.label: Memory capacity
field.hint: Enter object memory capacity

field.label: Footprint
field.hint: Enter object size

field.label: Inscription transcription
field.hint: Enter the transcription of the inscription

field.label: Preservation status
field.hint: Enter the storage condition of the item

field.label: Preservation status details
field.hint: Enter specification of the object's state of preservation

field.label: Bibliography
field.hint: Enter the bibliography related to the resource

field.label: External Links
field.hint: Enter the url of any linked resources

field.label: Licence
field.hint: Enter the terms of use attributed to this record

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract of the resource content

field.label: Annotation type
field.hint: Enter the type of annotation created

field.label: Subject
field.hint: Specify the annotation details

field.label: Person
field.hint: Enter the name of the person to whom the resource may be connected

field.label: Place
field.hint: Enter the location connected to the resource

field.label: Related Event
field.hint: Title of any event to which the resource is connected

field.label: Path
field.hint: Enter the path

field.label: Digital Collection - Aggregation
field.hint: Entering an Aggregation value linked to an existing authority will trigger the pre-fill functionality (item template), if a template is set on the corresponding Aggregation

field.label: Family
field.hint: Enter the family connected to the resource

field.label: Linked document
field.hint: Enter any links between the resource and other documents

field.label: Linked Anntation
field.hint: Enter any links to other annotations

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract of the resource content

field.label: Annotation type
field.hint: Enter the type of annotation created

field.label: Curation task type to be performed during the deposit phase
field.hint: Select the curation task

field.label: Person
field.hint: Indicate the person involved in the work in various capacities

field.label: Responsibility
field.hint: Select the responsibility of individual persons

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the work title
field.hint: Enter the title of the work

field.label: Author
field.hint: Enter the name of the author or authors of the work in the form Surname, First name

field.label: Exact date
field.hint: Exact date of the resource. Omit the day and month when not specified

field.label: Start date
field.hint: Initial chronological limit of the resource. Omit the day and month when not specified

field.label: End date
field.hint: Final chronological limit of the resource. Omit the day and month when not specified

field.label: Secular date
field.hint: Secular date of the resource. Indicate, where possible, the part of the century considered

field.label: Notes on date
field.hint: Enter any notes on the date

field.label: Uncertain authorship
field.hint: Select if the author is uncertain

field.label: Anonymous author
field.hint: Select if the author is anonymous

field.label: Type
field.hint: Select the type of text of the work

field.label: Literary genre
field.hint: Select the literary genre

field.label: Place
field.hint: Enter the location where the specimen was collected

field.label: Language
field.hint: Language of the resource. If the language does not appear in the list, select “Other”. If the content does not really have a language (e.g., if it is a dataset or an image), select “None”

field.label: People
field.hint: Indicate the people involved in the work in various capacities

field.label: Nature of the manuscript
field.required: Enter the nature of the item description
field.hint: Enter the nature of the object description

field.label: Bibliography
field.hint: Bibliography of the work

field.label: Licence
field.hint: Select the licence for use

field.label: Project
field.hint: Link to the project file

field.label: Collection
field.hint: Enter the name of the resource's level of affiliation

field.label: Event
field.hint: Link to the event file

field.label: Path
field.hint: DSpace GLAM path

field.label: Aggregation
field.hint: Specify any aggregation

field.label: Cataloguing URL
field.hint: Enter the URL of the corresponding catalogue card, if applicable

field.label: Identifier
field.hint: Enter the resource identifiers

field.label: Physical type
field.hint: Select the physical type

field.label: Subject / Medium
field.hint: Select the type of physical medium

field.label: Height
field.hint: Indicate the height of the document in millimetres

field.label: Width
field.hint: Indicate the width of the document in millimetres

field.label: Composite
field.hint: Specify whether the document is composite or not

field.label: Texture
field.required: Enter the consistency of the work
field.hint: Consistency expressed in number of pages

field.label: Part of
field.hint: Enter the uniform title of the work to which the resource belongs

field.label: Decoration
field.hint: Describe the decoration

field.label: Bibliographic level
field.hint: Enter the MAG bibliographic level

field.label: Incipit
field.hint: Enter the incipit

field.label: Explicit
field.hint: Enter the explicit

field.label: Latitude
field.hint: Enter the latitude of the location where the manuscript is located

field.label: Longitude
field.hint: Enter the longitude of the location where the manuscript is located

field.label: City
field.hint: Enter the municipality of the work’s provenance

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract of the resource's content

field.label: Description
field.hint: Enter the description of the object

field.label: Notes
field.hint: Enter any other comments/notes on the resource

field.label: Canvas Name
field.hint: Enter the name of the canvas

field.label: Canvas ID
field.hint: You must enter the canvasId. To retrieve the ID, view the item in Mirador, position yourself on the image to be linked to the story and select the alphanumeric string in the URL after ‘canvasId=’, e.g. a1a3f12-8d1a-4bf8-a222-1df0f4f70fe0

field.label: Item
field.hint: Insert the item from which the canvas originates

field.label: Title
field.required: Enter the title of the story
field.hint: Enter the title of the story

field.label: Abstract
field.hint: Enter the abstract of the story

field.label: Visible on Home Page
field.hint: Choose whether to display on the home page

field.label: Order
field.hint: Enter the order

field.label: Person
field.hint: Enter the name of the person connected to the story

field.label: Related event
field.hint: Enter the related event

field.label: Place
field.hint: If the Story is related to a Place, enter the Place name

field.label: Family
field.hint: Enter the family connected to the story

field.label: Organization
field.hint: Enter the organisation connected to the story

field.label: Related documents
field.hint: Enter links to other items in the digital library

field.label: Canvas Name
field.hint: Enter the name of the canvas

pair.displayed-value: Sant'Elena, Ascensione e Tristan da Cunha
